modifiers.value: Draft, then everyone randomizes roles!
No bans!
All Random!
A-M Champions only!
N-Z Champions only!
Male Champions only!
Female Champions only!
You cant pick champs starting with the same letter (For both teams!)
Male vs Female! (Lower Elo chooses side!)
Humans vs Everything else! (Lower Elo Chooses Side!)
Demacia vs Noxus! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Zaun vs Piltover! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Void vs Shurima! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Bilgewater vs Shadow Isles! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Targon vs Ixtal! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Ionia vs Noxus! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Freljord vs Bandle City! (Lower Elo team picks side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy regions!)
Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion! (Every champion on your team must be from a different region)
Lane Synergy! (Mid + JG pick from the same region and Bot + Sup pick from the same region!)
Marksmen/Supports vs Mages! (Lower Elo team pick side!)
Tanks vs Fighters! (Lower Elo Team picks side!)
Ranged Riot! (Play only ranged champions)
Melee Madness! (Play only melee champions)
Public Space! (Nobody can take Flash!)
Summoner Speciality! (Both teams choose a summoner spell other than flash. The teams must all use their chosen summoner!)
Dark Map! (Everyone must take sweeper and stay on it!) (No control wards or support item wards)
I see you! (Everyone must take farsight trinket ASAP and stay on it!)
Everywhere is warded!!! (Everyone must take and stay on yellow trinket!)
Spirit Blossom vs Blood Moon! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Christmas vs Halloween! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
KDA/Heartsteel/True Damage/Pentakill Champions! (Don't ban any champions)
New Years vs Valentines! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Coven vs Star Guardians! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Pool Party vs Infernal! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Night/Dawnbringers vs Cosmic/Dark Star! (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Day Job/Arcade/Bees (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Elderwood/Anima Squad vs Project (Lower Elo team chooses side, and you can't pick or ban champs from the enemy skinline!)
Play 5 1v1s with all players! Match MMR as best as possible, first team to three wins, win!
modifiers.description: -# Even if a team wins early, play all 5 games.

modifiers.value: Side Quest! (Pick champions with rivalry quests. You can't ban champs with quests and at least 1 must be possible this game!)
'Normal' Game! (Don't put points into your ultimate!)
modifiers.description: -# Champions that start with a point in their ultimate are allowed!

modifiers.value: Keystone Collector! (Both teams choose a keystone. The teams must all use their chosen keystone!)
Stackin'! (Both teams play champions that can infinitely stack! No banning infinitely stacking champions!)
Where's your sword? Don't need it. (Don't put points in one of your basic abilities)
modifiers.description: -# Champions that start with a point in one of their abilities are allowed!

modifiers.value: Draw Your Draft! (Each player must draw the champion they want to ban, then draw the champion they want to pick)
modifiers.description:
-# Setup a 3 minute timer for the ban phase, and a 3 minute timer for the pick phase! 
-# Two of the same champion are allowed! (Must be on opposing teams)

modifiers.value: Power of Friendship! (Everyone must be in the same VC!)
modifiers.description: -# Don't deafen/mute and call in private!

modifiers.value: Monochromatic! (Everyone must pick a colour, and base their build around it!) (Blue -> Arcane Comet, Ghost + Cleanse, Essence Reaver + Muramana (etc))
modifiers.description: -# IT'S NOT THAT DEEP! BLUE/PURPLE, RED/ORANGE/YELLOW, etc CAN GO TOGETHER. JUST HAVE FUN!

modifiers.value: The Spy! (One member of each team must be in the enemy team's VC!)
A Change of Scenery! (Draft Pick, but you play on an ARAM map!)
Nah, I'd win. (For both teams, each role must pick the same champion. Lower elo player decides the champion per role)
Take notes. (You must pick the enemy team player's highest mastery champion for your role)
It's High Noon. (The team to take Baron Nashor first, wins the game)
[INSANITY!] Mortal Reminder. (If you die, leave the game. If you take a turret, your entire team revives!)
[INSANITY!] The Price of Living. (If you die, you must sell an item in your inventory) (Cannot be wards/potions)
[INSANITY!] Musical Lanes! (Every 5 minutes, you must rotate lanes (Until two towers are destroyed)) (Blue side goes downwards, Red side goes upwards)
[INSANITY!] Ultimate Addict! (You must use your ultimate off cooldown, no matter what)
modifiers.description: -# If you have a targetted ultimate, RUN AT SOMEONE.

modifiers.value: [INSANITY!] Solidarity! (If someone on your team flashes, everyone else must flash ASAP)
modifiers.description: -# Summoner CD reduction is not allowed!

modifiers.value: [INSANITY!] ADC Protection Program! (If your ADC dies, everyone else on the team must die)
modifiers.description: -# If you are already dead when the ADC dies, you do NOT need to die again.

modifiers.value: [INSANITY!] Signature Weapon! (You can only use one item slot!)
modifiers.description: -# To buy an elixir, you MUST sell your item first!

modifiers.value: [INSANITY!] Mid Monopoly! (Only one person from each team can be in mid lane at any time!)
